'''Tempest Scout 3''' was an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] in [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]. It was assigned to the task of searching for potential [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] traps while operating on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Tempest Scout 3 participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], where it was destroyed.
